title: GBM-Probe JRN Estimation on rel-hm with Corrected Metric Direction, Fan-Out Stratification, and FK-Shuffling
summary: Demo notebook for GBM-Probe Join Reproduction Number (JRN) estimation on the rel-hm (H&M) relational dataset. Uses a curated mini dataset (84 customers, 85 articles, 100 transactions) extracted from the full rel-hm data. The notebook runs all 5 phases: baseline+JRN estimation with LightGBM probes across 2 tasks (user-churn classification, item-sales regression) x 5 aggregation types x 3 seeds, fan-out stratification, FK-shuffling confound decomposition (5 permutations), aggregation sensitivity analysis, and JRN-guided vs uniform architecture comparison. Includes matplotlib visualizations of JRN values, decomposition, and architecture comparison. Full original parameters used; completes in ~2 seconds.
